title: Smoke-test @modelcontextprotocol/sdk on Bun
description: Before building the MCP server (Phase 4), verify the one unproven dependency: that @modelcontextprotocol/sdk imports and runs on Bun. Construct an McpServer, register a trivial tool, connect a client over an in-memory transport, list and call the tool. This de-risks the whole phase.
acceptance: A minimal McpServer with one registered tool can be constructed.
A client connected via an in-memory transport can list the tool and call it, getting the expected result.
A bun:test covers the round trip; typecheck and biome stay clean.
notes: Phase 4 (roadmap). If the SDK misbehaves on Bun, fall back to Node for the MCP entrypoint (the core stays Bun) or a thin shim — decide here.
